$comment: Expected command/event prefixes for RFC-04 POC taxonomies. Not an exhaustive log; order within groups may embed engine-specific detail.
jq_binding: switch.when expressions use root workflow state: .intent, .confidence, .messages (see fixture state_schema).
description: User intent classifies as technical with sufficient confidence; route selects search_kb; tools succeed; terminal success.
command_prefix_annotated: ScheduleNode (route) — orchestration may collapse switch into same tick as classify completion
event_prefix_annotated: NodeScheduled (route) — if emitted as distinct step
implementation_note: Engines MAY coalesce NodeScheduled for switch with CompleteNode(classify) in one transition; companions remain valid if the observed prefix is a refinement of this order (no reordering across activities).
